title: Wedbush Analyst Boosts SoundHound AI (SOUN) Price Target, Predicts Strong 2025 Growth
text: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives significantly increased his price target for SoundHound AI (NASDAQ:SOUN) on December 16, raising it from $10 to $22 while maintaining an Outperform rating. Ives expressed confidence in the voice AI technology company, anticipating stronger performance in 2025. He noted that SoundHound is in the early stages of capitalizing on its growth initiatives with enterprise AI demand just starting. The analyst also characterized the company as an underappreciated pure-play AI company that is taking significant strides in taking share across the landscape. The article contextualizes this upgrade within broader concerns about AI progress plateauing across the industry. However, it positions SoundHound as a promising voice AI solution provider with 11 hedge fund holders tracking the stock. According to the article's ranking system, SOUN placed 9th among AI stocks dominating Wall Street at the time of publication.
